matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Chidushei Agadot on Gittin 57a:1
matches.x: You shall not seek their peace or their welfare, etc.: He was not so evil as to say, "Go and battle against them to distress them," but rather, "You shall not seek their peace. etc." And it is as it is written about the nations that the Holy One blessed be He, distanced us from clinging to them - meaning Ammon and Moav.
